features.summary: Added deterministic GET /api/answer endpoint with grounded draft and not_found responses.
Fixed server integration test lifecycle so the full test suite completes cleanly.
Added normalized ingestion for Markdown and TXT, preserved PDF via adapter, and documented DOCX dependency requirement.
Replaced DOCX ingestion stub with mammoth-based plain-text extraction into normalized sections.
Implemented provider-agnostic embedding chunk planning, deterministic identity, repository boundary, and idempotent indexing tests.
